matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110000 2
1 1000000 1
2 0000000 a
3 0000001 1
4 1011100 4
5 0010110 3
6 0000010 1
7 0110110 4

70 07 0010100 2
